queries.name: Implementation Onboarding Table
queries.description: Deals in Project Handover for companies in Customer Onboarding, one row per deal x product family (HR & Payroll / PeopleBox) with per-family MRR, implementation fee, fee status, bundle contents, and the company's implementation fields (PM, KOM dates, HR URL, etc.). For the Implementation team's app.
queries.sql:
WITH li_fam AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(li.deal_id AS BIGINT) AS deal_key,
    CASE WHEN lower(li.product_name) LIKE '%peoplebox%' OR lower(li.parent_product) LIKE '%peoplebox%'
         THEN 'PeopleBox' ELSE 'HR & Payroll' END AS product_family,
    CASE WHEN li.recurring_billing_frequency IS NOT NULL
          AND lower(trim(li.recurring_billing_frequency)) <> 'one time payment'
          AND li.contract_term_months >= 12
          AND NOT (li.product_name = 'Instacash' OR li.product_name LIKE '%Ready%')
         THEN li.mrr ELSE 0 END AS li_mrr,
    CASE WHEN lower(li.product_name) LIKE '%implement%' THEN li.amount ELSE 0 END AS li_implem,
    CASE WHEN li.bundled_products IS NOT NULL AND li.bundled_products NOT IN ('None','')
         THEN li.bundled_products END AS bundled_clean
  FROM shared.revops.silver_line_items li
  WHERE li.tribe_new = 'Core'
     OR lower(li.product_name)   LIKE '%peoplebox%'
     OR lower(li.parent_product) LIKE '%peoplebox%'
     OR lower(li.product_name)   LIKE '%implement%'
),
fam AS (
  SELECT deal_key, product_family,
         SUM(li_mrr)                                  AS fam_mrr,
         SUM(li_implem)                               AS fam_implem,
         array_join(collect_set(bundled_clean), ' | ') AS bundled_products
  FROM li_fam GROUP BY deal_key, product_family
)
SELECT
  d.deal_id, d.deal_name, d.stage_label AS deal_stage,
  c.Company_name AS company_name, c.Client_stage AS client_stage, c.Client_status AS client_status,
  fam.product_family, fam.bundled_products, fam.fam_mrr AS mrr, fam.fam_implem AS implem_fee_amount,
  CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(c.Implementation_fee_status),'') IS NOT NULL THEN c.Implementation_fee_status
       WHEN fam.fam_implem = 0 THEN 'Waived'
       WHEN fam.fam_implem > 0 THEN 'Paid' ELSE NULL END AS implem_fee_waive_or_paid,
  c.Segment AS segment, c.Implem_packages AS implem_packages, c.Project_manager AS project_manager,
  c.Payroll_master AS payroll_master, c.Sales_Consultant AS salesperson, c.Headcount AS headcount,
  c.Proposal_date AS proposal_date, c.NPN_date AS npn_date, c.NPN_month AS npn_month,
  c.Welcome_email_date AS welcome_email_date, c.Target_KOM AS target_kom, c.Actual_KOM AS actual_kom,
  c.KOM_month AS kom_month, c.KOM_quarter AS kom_quarter, c.KOM_year AS kom_year,
  c.Project_handover_date AS project_handover, c.Sprout_hr_url AS sprout_hr_url,
  c.Payroll_company_code AS sprout_payroll_code, c.Churn_effectivity_date AS churn_date,
  c.Industry AS industry, c.Company_address AS company_address
FROM fam
JOIN shared.revops.silver_deals   d ON CAST(d.deal_id AS BIGINT) = fam.deal_key
LEFT JOIN shared.revops.silver_company c ON CAST(d.company_id AS BIGINT) = CAST(c.Company_id AS BIGINT)
WHERE d.stage_label = 'Project Handover' AND c.Client_stage = 'Customer Onboarding'
ORDER BY c.Company_name, d.deal_id, product_family
